# Ph Measurement

**Summary**: Measuring the acidity or alkalinity of a substance.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-wajheeuddin|Wajheeuddin, 2014]] used ph-measurement to assess the impact of date seeds on mud pH levels.

## Key Results and Findings

- The addition of date seeds lowers the pH of both the mud and the mud filtrate. ([[2014-wajheeuddin|Wajheeuddin, 2014, p. 84]])
